title: solidago coreana var. dahurica
intro: Solidago coreana var. dahurica, also known as Dahurian goldenrod, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dahurian goldenrod include reducing fever, relieving cold and flu symptoms, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
